<br />

My personal [NixOS](https://nixos.org/) configuration using a [dendritic layout](https://github.com/mightyiam/dendritic/) with [flake-parts](https://flake.parts/).

## 🚧 Project Status:
This project is currently being built by ground up by referencing and copying other people's NixOS configurations, as well as my [previous] configuration.

### 📋 Plan
1. [ ] 🔧 Make Justfile for automation and unification.
2. [ ] 💻 Set up NixOS environment.
3. [ ] 🌿 Follow dendritic pattern.
4. [ ] 📝 Make features section in the readme
5. [ ] 🔜 And so on to explore...

## 🔗 Credits

- 🌿 Dendretic pattern — https://dendrix.oeiuwq.com/Dendritic.html
- 🌿 Dendritic pattern 2  — https://github.com/mightyiam/dendritic
- 💡 Inspiration  — https://github.com/fbosch/nixos

[previous]: <https://github.com/monyx-nuked/nix-config> "Might get deprecated or deleted"
